flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at McHenry County College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at McHenry County College are 17% above the public certificate-predominant peer median ($45.1k vs $38.4k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at McHenry County College fell 11% between 2017 and 2020 ($7.0k → $6.3k).
